name: Tandoori Style Chicken Breasts W/Yogurt Cilantro Sauce (Gr)
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground pepper, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, puree the onion and garlic.
2. Process the lemon and lime juice, adding spices and yogurt until fully blended.
3. Marinate chicken breasts in this mixture; turn occasionally overnight in the refrigerator.
4. Prepare a charcoal or wood fire and allow it to burn down to embers.
5. Remove excess marinade from the chicken.
6. Grill the chicken for 5 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
7. Serve with Yogurt Cilantro sauce, adjusted to taste.
